name: tax_lookup
description: Look up tax refunds for a customer by their name. Returns a JSON array of matching refund records with name, refund_type (PROPERTY_TAX, STALE_WARRANT, or PAYROLL), amount, claim_deadline, address, and claim_url. Returns a no-match message string if no refunds are found.

customer_name.description: The customer's full name to search for refunds
